reviews.comment: I’d been dreading this move after a bad experience in the past, but I kept passing these guys' flyers around the city and took it as a sign—no pun intended! From start to finish, Mateo and Henry went above and beyond to make this move easy for me. They were straightforward, reliable, and took great care with my things. It was a huge relief to simply hand over my key fob and watch them handle everything so smoothly and efficiently. I always prefer supporting local businesses, and Mateo and Henry made me feel like family. I’ll definitely be calling them again in the future! Thanks again guys! :)

reviewReply.comment: Appreciate you leaving such a thoughtful review — even if I’m getting to it a bit late! 😊 So glad Henry and Mateo could turn things around and make your move a smooth one. We always aim to give reliable, stress-free moving service here in Chicago, and it means a lot that you trusted Comfort Moving Chicago. Thanks again for the support — hope all’s still going great in your new place!

reviews.comment:
Mateo and his crew came over IMMEDIATELY to help me move my apartment. They were very professional, helpful, and helped me with every task with which I needed assistance.

I was very impressed with how easy it was to work with them. Nothing was broken; all
Items were very gently moved, they didn’t complain at the VERY annoying old sliding elevator door (which wouldn’t open all the way either!), and they all had smiles on their faces
and worked steadily and very hard the entire time.

I hired them to move me a SECOND time, and I plan to use their assistance whenever I need help in the future. Don’t give your money to an impersonal corporation or company that will overcharge money, be rude, breaks things, etc.

Definitely hire these guys! Five stars all the way!! Best customer  experience in a VERY long time.

reviews.comment: Ethan and Henry helped me move into a 4th floor walk-up on a hot and muggy day and were total troopers about it. I've got two heavy dressers, a heavy bed frame, and had 27 boxes, plus a bunch of other random stuff. With just the two of them it took about three hours start to finish. There was good communication from when I first reached out for a quote, to the day-of when they gave me plenty of notice that they were running an hour behind. I would definitely recommend Comfort Moving to anyone who's looking for affordable service and friendly movers!

reviews.comment: Highly recommend this moving company due to their professionalism, skill and friendliness. I had a great experience from start to finish. They do require an initial deposit, though it’s credited to your balance at the end of the move. The movers were punctual and arrived right at the start time of the move. The move took about 3.5 hours in total and they moved my 1B/1BR along with my workout equipment. They also wrap all fragile/high value items and move with care. Next time I move, I’ll be using these guys again! Thanks!

reviews.comment: I could not have been more pleased with my moving experience! Ethan and Matteo were simply the most helpful and thoughtful movers I’ve ever worked with. They were quick, responsive and professional. We moved out of a 2 bed, 1 bath apartment second floor walk up and they were extremely efficient. We had quite a bit of items to load and they were able to strategically fit everything into a 20ft truck. So happy we chose them and they are truly the best value out of any movers I looked at!

reviews.comment: Amazing team. These guys are fast, efficient, friendly, and very accommodating. Was the easiest move I've ever done and I would recommend them to anyone. They were very communicative about any issues or minor things that came up during the move, even making me aware of a bit of water that got on one of my boxes as soon as they noticed so I could take action if it was needed. Can't thank them enough. And for the price I don't think any other company in Chicago has them beat.
